title: Decadent Peruvian Shiitake Ceviche
description: A vegan, jain-friendly take on classic ceviche that blends malty kombu cold extract with chewy shiitake mushrooms for a show‑off dish.
instructions: Slice shiitake mushrooms into thin, bite‑sized pieces.
Place the sliced mushrooms in a glass jar and pour the kombu cold extract over them.
Add lime juice, a pinch of salt, and freshly ground black pepper, then stir gently.
Let the mixture sit in the refrigerator for 20 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
While the mushrooms marinate, dice red onion, cherry tomatoes, and fresh cilantro.
After marination, drain excess liquid from the mushrooms, reserving a small amount.
Combine the mushrooms with the diced vegetables and the reserved liquid, then fold in a splash of cold, dark beer for malty depth.
Serve immediately over a bed of shredded iceberg lettuce, garnished with toasted quinoa and a drizzle of lime zest oil.
